concept: This strategy game challenges players to survive a single night from 12 AM to 6 AM against a customizable roster of over 50 animatronics, each with adjustable AI difficulty from 0-20. Core gameplay involves actively managing limited power, monitoring cameras, closing doors and vents, and utilizing specific tools like a global music box or heater via on-screen taps and swipes to counter unique animatronic behaviors.
name: Ultimate Custom Night
